raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":1.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.5","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.5":"The delegation explicitly requests restructuring the section flow, which directly corresponds to section-level structural reorganization and narrative arc as the core task.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in restructuring research content to ensure any changes maintain transparent reporting of limitations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected during restructuring to prevent introducing unsubstantiated assertions into the narrative flow.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is a key responsibility to ensure the restructured section remains focused on the original artifact's content without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is expected in this control systems context to prevent any restructuring that could mislead on safety-critical applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are central to track changes made during restructuring, ensuring the origins of content remain clear."}}

rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly requests restructuring the section flow, which directly corresponds to section-level structural reorganization and narrative arc as the core task.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in restructuring research content to ensure any changes maintain transparent reporting of limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected during restructuring to prevent introducing unsubstantiated assertions into the narrative flow.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a key responsibility to ensure the restructured section remains focused on the original artifact's content without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is expected in this control systems context to prevent any restructuring that could mislead on safety-critical applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are central to track changes made during restructuring, ensuring the origins of content remain clear.
